rules.rule: User-visible strings in packages/ui/src/native/** must use useSdkTranslation() with t('key') or <Trans i18nKey="key">. Add every new key to packages/ui/src/i18n/locales/en.json (typed as SdkTranslationKey). Flag hardcoded English in Text children, accessibilityLabel, and SDK-owned headerTitle values — e.g. "Cancel", "Loading", "Books", "Versions". Do not flag packages/ui/src/dom/** (ADR 0009), test files, or consumer-provided prop values. See docs/contributing/native-i18n.md.
